ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wind_turbine_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the data record */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the turbines table */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wind_farms table */,
  "active_power_kW" REAL /* Active power generated by the wind turbine in kilowatts */,
  "wind_speed_m_s" REAL /* Wind speed at turbine location in meters per second */,
  "theoretical_power_curve_kWh" REAL /* Theoretical power output based on wind conditions in kilowatt-hours */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Direction of the wind measured in degrees */,
  "ambient_temperature" REAL /* Ambient temperature at the turbine location */,
  "blade_angle" REAL /* Blade angle */,
  "blade_pitch" REAL /* Blade pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id", "timestamp"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_turbine_data_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_turbine_data_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wind_farms" (
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wind farm */,
  "farm_name" TEXT /* Name of the wind farm */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the wind farm */,
  "total_turbines" INTEGER /* Total number of turbines installed at the wind farm */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the operators table */,
  "capacity_MW" REAL /* Total capacity of the wind farm in megawatts */,
  "commissioning_date" TEXT /* Date when the wind farm was commissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("farm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wind_farms_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wind farm to which the turbine belongs */,
  "turbine_model" TEXT /* Model of the turbine */,
  "capacity_kW" REAL /* Rated capacity of the turbine in kilowatts */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the turbine was installed */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Status of the turbine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the turbine */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the turbine model was released */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbines_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine that underwent maintenance */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "duration_hours" REAL /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine data record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "access_route" TEXT /* Route or method used to access the data */,
  "access_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for data access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES wind_turbine_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine triggering the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "operator_address" TEXT /* Address of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "farm_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the wind_farms table */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the weather station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_farm_id FOREIGN KEY ("farm_id") REFERENCES wind_farms ("farm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather_stations table */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather data record */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Measure of the temperature at the weather station location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Measure of the humidity at the weather station location */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Measure of the wind speed at the weather station location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)
